package snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen

import me.tbsten.cream.*

/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [Outer])
 * 
 * Type-preserving Outer.copy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Outer = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Outer = state.copy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Outer = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Outer = state.copy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see Outer
 * @see Leaf
 * @see Other
 */
public fun <T : Any?> snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen.Outer<T>.copy(
    value: T = this.value,
): snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen.Outer<T> = when (this) {
    is snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen.Leaf -> this.copy(value = value)
    is snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen.Other -> this.copy(value = value)
}
````

## Input

package snap.sealedCopy.nestedGen

import me.tbsten.cream.SealedCopy

@SealedCopy
sealed interface Outer<T> {
    val value: T
}

sealed interface Mid<T> : Outer<T>

data class Leaf<T>(override val value: T) : Mid<T>
data class Other<T>(override val value: T) : Outer<T>
